Class KiraKjpTimelineIntensiveCare

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.timeline.KiraKjpTimelineIntensiveCare
All Implemented Interfaces:
TimelineFunctionalities
public class KiraKjpTimelineIntensiveCare extends DashboardDataItemLogic implements TimelineFunctionalities
This class is used for generating the data items containing kiradar kjp timelines.
